strategy: Kill the Mysterious Werewolf first. While it lives it heals the whole enemy team (Pigsie plus HoTs) and blades them (two +30% each) on a 4-round cycle.
Expect the Werewolf to survive one kill: it revives once at full health, then leaves combat, ending those buffs. Burn it down twice or overkill it so it is gone before you commit to the boss.
Storm boss with a huge 164% damage boost; his hits hurt, so keep shields up. Use your strongest boosted school (his lowest resist is Fire and Life at 66%).
Team: the hitter focuses the Werewolf out first, then the group AoEs the Brute and Bauk Scavenger. Blade the hitter the same round to beat the heal cycle.
cheatNotes: When the Mysterious Werewolf is defeated it revives once at full health, then exits combat at end of turn.
The buff cycle repeats every 4 rounds as long as the Mysterious Werewolf is alive.
At the start of the cycle's first round the Werewolf casts a Pigsie that heals all allies and gives them three HoTs for 4 rounds.
At the start of the cycle's fourth round the Werewolf casts a Bladestorm giving all allies two +30% damage charms.
